title: cartographer: sync fun feature flag in architecture docs to match cargo.toml 🗺️
summary: Fixed factual drift in `docs/architecture.md` where the `fun` feature flag mapping incorrectly listed `tokmd-format/fun` instead of `tokmd-core/fun`. Updated CI proof policy to recognize architecture docs.
proof_summary: Compared `crates/tokmd/Cargo.toml` with `docs/architecture.md` and corrected the mismatch. Registered docs to avoid 'unknown file' failure in the proof executor.
